title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at NSE Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at NSE Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
NSE Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE Digital Technologies:
NSE Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
